differentials.name: Subacute thyroiditis due to trauma Cause:   palpation, parathyroid surgery, direct surgical trauma, thyroid biopsy, seatbelt injury
differentials.raw: Subacute thyroiditis due to trauma Cause:   palpation, parathyroid surgery, direct surgical trauma, thyroid biopsy, seatbelt injury

context: =  inflammatory destruction of thyroid follicles with release of preformed hormone into the circulation Classification: ◊  Enable radioiodine uptake test by suspending breast-feeding for 1 week, during which time the radioiodine-contaminated breast milk should be pumped and discarded (b)  cytokine-associated thyroiditis (interferon-alpha for chronic hepatitis B/C, interleukin-2 as adjunctive therapy for metastatic cancer and leukemia) (c)  lithium-associated thyroiditis
